auto_pagination.description: Automatically breaks massive AI responses into seamless chunks to bypass token limits.
auto_pagination.impact: Prevents 'cut off' responses on huge deep-dives.

chat_history_profiling.description: Learn from conversation patterns for personalization
chat_history_profiling.impact: Kitty will automatically adapt her persona to your preferences over time.

unhinged_mode.description: Allow chaotic personality shifts and glitch effects
unhinged_mode.impact: Enables experimental personality modes with visual effects.

voice_input.impact: Allows hands-free interaction via voice commands.

screen_watcher.impact: Provides ambient awareness but uses more system resources.

hardware_vision_auto_search.description: Automatically searches for component prices (DigiKey, Mouser) when analyzing a PCB photo.
hardware_vision_auto_search.impact: Saves time, but uses more API calls.
